set_check_update_sub.message: You are on the latest version

set_tip_ui_language.message: Changes the PigeonDeck interface language without changing page content.

set_tip_theme.message: Switches extension panels and the toolbar between light and dark appearance.

set_tip_granularity.message: Chooses whether page clicks select one element or a detected component block by default.

set_tip_position.message: Returns the floating ball and toolbar to the default bottom-right position.

set_tip_deletion_layout.message: Chooses whether deleting an element keeps its layout space; only new deletions use the changed value.

set_tip_longpress.message: Starts region selection after you hold the page for this duration.

set_tip_drag_threshold.message: In Move mode, starts dragging after you hold an element for this duration; 0 ms starts immediately.

set_tip_history_limit.message: Limits how many operations can be undone and redone.

set_tip_card_expand.message: Chooses whether newly created annotation cards start expanded or collapsed.

set_tip_show_modbar.message: Shows or hides common text modification controls in the annotation panel.

set_tip_hover_label.message: Shows an element name and size label while hovering over page elements.

set_tip_shortcuts.message: Configures keyboard actions available while the toolbar is expanded; use Record to rebind them.

set_tip_sc_undo.message: Undoes the latest annotation, edit, move, resize, deletion, or clear operation.

set_tip_sc_redo.message: Runs the most recently undone operation again.

set_tip_sc_exit.message: Closes the current popover or panel, or exits the active tool mode.

set_tip_sc_save.message: Saves an annotation or commits text, style, and media changes.

set_tip_sc_delete.message: Deletes the selected page element; it does not run while typing in a text field.

set_tip_sc_movefree.message: Hold this modifier while moving an element to temporarily bypass snapping.

set_tip_export_language.message: Chooses the export language for task lists and image annotation cards; Follow interface uses the current UI language.

set_tip_image_method.message: Chooses the default action after an image is generated; the export panel still offers copy and download.

set_tip_watermark.message: Adds the page URL and generation time to the bottom of exported images.

set_tip_onboarding.message: Opens the quick-start page shown after extension installation.

set_tip_check_update.message: Shows the update status of the installed extension version.

set_tip_github.message: Opens the project source code and documentation in a new tab.

set_tip_feedback.message: Opens GitHub Issues in a new tab to submit a problem or suggestion.

toast_position_reset.description: Toast after resetting the floating ball position

toast_update_latest.message: You are on the latest version
toast_update_latest.description: Toast after checking for updates (V1 placeholder)

onboarding_subtitle.message: Annotate any web page and hand a ready-to-run task list to your AI.

onboarding_step1_body.message: Click the floating ball in the corner to expand the tools. It opens straight into annotation mode.

onboarding_step2_body.message: Single-click any element to drop a numbered pin and write a note. Long-press and drag to box a region.

onboarding_step3_body.message: Double-click text to rewrite it, tweak styles in the card, or switch to Move mode to reposition components with snapping.

onboarding_step4_body.message: Hit Copy as Text for an AI-ready task list, or Copy as Image for an annotated screenshot.

onboarding_scenario_body.message: Pin the hero heading and ask for shorter copy, recolor a button, then drag the sign-up card up to align with the nav. One Copy as Text later, you have a structured task list — page context, global rules, and every change — ready to paste into Codex or any coding AI.

onboarding_feat_annotate_desc.message: Numbered pins with notes on any element.

onboarding_feat_region_desc.message: Long-press and drag to mark an area.

onboarding_feat_edit_desc.message: Rewrite text and tune styles inline.

onboarding_feat_move_desc.message: Drag components with edge and center guides.

onboarding_feat_undo_desc.message: Step back and forward through every change.

onboarding_feat_copyimage_desc.message: Export a single annotated long screenshot.

onboarding_feat_settings_desc.message: Themes, language, export options and more.

onboarding_footer.message: Made for web review and AI-assisted delivery.

onboarding_hint.message: Look for the pigeon in the bottom-right corner of any page.

onboarding_cta.message: That's it — paste into Codex or any coding AI and let it build.

onboarding_reopen.message: You can reopen this page anytime from Settings → Help.

onboarding_kbd_esc.message: Close the top layer, then the panel, then exit the current mode.

onboarding_kbd_save.message: Save the note or commit a text / style edit.

onboarding_kbd_enter.message: New line inside a note — it does not submit.

onboarding_kbd_alt.message: Hold while dragging for free move — temporarily bypasses snapping.

onboarding_kbd_note.message: Rebind any of these in Settings → Shortcuts.

popup_unsupported_site.description: Popup host line when the page has no annotatable host

popup_status_running.description: Popup status: extension active on this page

popup_status_site_off.description: Popup status: extension disabled for this site

popup_status_unsupported.description: Popup status: unsupported page (PDF, chrome:// etc.)

popup_remove.description: Popup remove disabled site button aria-label

popup_file_notice.message: file:// pages need "Allow access to file URLs" enabled in the extension details.

popup_pdf_notice.message: This page is a PDF; annotation is not supported in V1.

ctx_quick_annotate.description: Right-click context menu: quick annotate entry
